# RoguePod LiteCast

> RoguePod LiteCast is a podcast dedicated to reviewing roguelite and roguelike games. Hosted by Danny and David, new episodes release every other Wednesday.

RoguePod LiteCast is the go-to podcast for fans of roguelite and roguelike video games. Each episode, hosts Danny and David review a different roguelite game and place it on their definitive tier list — ranking games from S-tier to D-tier based on how good they are *as a roguelite*, not just as a game overall.

## What We Cover

Games reviewed include: Slay the Spire, Hades, Dead Cells, Balatro, Risk of Rain 2, The Binding of Isaac, FTL: Faster Than Light, Into the Breach, Spelunky, Rogue Legacy, Gunfire Reborn, Mewgenics, and many more roguelite and roguelike titles.

## What Makes a Good Roguelite?

The hosts evaluate games through a roguelite-specific lens: run variety, build diversity, meta-progression, replayability, and the feeling of each run being fresh and meaningful.
